reason: Twelve jurors debate a single verdict entirely through tense dialogue.
A lonely writer and a judge hash out a life-and-death case over drinks.
A desperate father and a kidnapped child’s voice carry a suspenseful talk.
After a cold case, two detectives converse in a diner as truths unravel.
Two convenience-store clerks banter through a shift that reveals hidden pains.
A radio host and caller spar in a booth, their subtext exposing deep wounds.
High school students converse under the shadow of a looming masked killer.
Roommates confront their own demons through a night of raw confession.
An orphan meets her lookalike cousin in whispers that speak volumes of loss.
A mad reporter and a crooked guard trade barbs in a small courtroom.
